observed_weaknesses: The CLI accepted multiple preview sort selectors in one scan.
The last sort option silently won, making command intent order-dependent.

selected_candidate.name: CLI preview sort conflict rejection
selected_candidate.reason: Treat --weakest-first as a preview sort selector and reject duplicate sort configuration.
selected_candidate.success_metric: Both duplicate sort orders exit non-zero; a single --weakest-first scan still succeeds.

safety_controls: The change is limited to promptvault-cli.rs.
Both conflicting argument orders were smoke-tested.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
